name: Crawley Athletics Track (K2)
metaTitle: Crawley Athletics Track (K2) | Facility Information & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check the latest wind speed and facility information for the Crawley Athletics Track at K2 Crawley.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: The centre is open Mon-Fri 06:00-22:00 and Sat-Sun 07:00-18:00. Please check the specific track timetable for availability.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Access is available via pay-as-you-go or membership. Contact the centre for the latest track-specific pricing.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Free on-site parking is available for centre users, including accessible Blue Badge parking bays.

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: K2 Crawley, Pease Pottage Hill, Crawley, RH11 9BQ

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official Everyone Active page for K2 Crawley for bookings and facility details.
